response.justification: Exceptional candidate with 20 years of full-stack experience mastering the primary tech stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS). Currently Staff-level at re:cinq, actively building AI agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks—directly addressing a key required skill. Strong architecture and mentorship background evidenced through multiple staff roles and teaching initiatives. Primary concerns: no explicit Jest/Vitest/Playwright mention despite TDD expertise, Nest.js not called out, and potential flight risk given staff-level role.
strengths: Mastery of primary tech stack across 20+ years: TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes
Actively developing AI agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq—rare expertise directly matching required AI agent development skills
Proven architecture and leadership at staff level, with strong mentorship track record through workshops, open-source platforms (GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts), and teaching roles
concerns: Jest, Vitest, and Playwright not explicitly mentioned in resume despite being primary stack testing requirement (though strong TDD background across multiple roles)
Nest.js not called out; Node.js experience appears limited to raw Node.js and custom frameworks rather than production frameworks
Currently Staff-level for mid-senior IC role—potential flight risk or under-engagement if hired below current seniority level
